text:
/ci1 ん、あれ？　ラプラス？
１％のキズ？　どうしたの？

/ci1 小型幻創種の爆発で大型幻創種にも
ダメージが入っているようです。
これ、もしかしたら……

/ci2 2 そうだな、目玉野郎の爆発に
あのデカブツを巻き込めば……！
/ci1 Hm? Laplace? Are you 1% injured? What's wrong?

/ci1 Looks like the small phantasm's explosion did
damage to the large phantasm. Maybe that's the
trick...

/ci2 2 Yeah, good call. If we can just lure the
big one into the eyeballs' explosions...
